feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Tree structure of material to production orders
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We would like to create a tree structure between materials and production orders using SAP data

Our aim is to create the following structure:

 

DispoLevelMaterial StartMaterial HeaderMaterial ComponentProductionOrder StartProductionOrder HeaderProductionOrder Component
3M0M2M3P0P2P3
2M0M1M2P0P1P2
1M0M0M1P0P0P1
3M0……P0a……

The first part with the materials can also be created using the BOM resolution. The problem we have is the right part, because a material can have many different production orders and here we also try to create this tree structure, which material should be assigned exactly to which order and, above all, how the individual production orders are linked to each other.

The question is: Can this structure be created and if so, how with which tables/data from SAP?

Thanks in advance for the help 🙂

entry.title: Can I set the Screen layout for S_ALR_87011990 in the selection screen?
entry.content:
I'm working on an automation project for month-end closing. We are using a software that runs RFC call to execute standard SAP Tcodes / programs and read out the results from spool for documentation purposes. 

The spool output must be in a specific layout which we maintain by using predefined "screen layouts". This works great for most transactions as they have the field "Layout" in the initial selection screens. One notable exception is "S_ALR_87011990" for which I cannot find the field (thanks SAP for being consistent, ugh :/). As a GUI user running the transaction in the foreground, I just need to select the correct layout once the output is produced. However, this cannot be done by the software we're using as it runs the transaction "in the background". 

We set a specific layout as the "default" layout and it worked for a while, but someone at some point inadvertently set a different variant as default, which "broke" the functionality. 

Does anyone have any ideas how to handle this. Is there a way to select the Layout in the initial selection screen? I've seen a similar question asked here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/screen-layout-for-s-alr-87011990/qaq-p/12586939 but there was no conclusive reply.

Alternatively, is there a way to set the default variant for the CPI user the software is using to communicate? 

Maybe there's a totally different way to solve this problem? Can anyone help?

entry.title: Open ASN during MRP run - deleted order
entry.content:
For long time, I am struggling to understand following MRP behavior, which is causing troubles. 

standard process:

OPEN ORDER -> ASN -> GR -> FULLFILLED ORDER

broken process:

OPEN ORDER -> ASN -> ORDER DELETED BY MRP -> GR DONE FOR NEXT EXISTING ORDER (but total order qty lower that really required)

OPEN ORDER -> ASN -> ORDER DELETED BY MRP -> GR NOT POSSIBLE

How is that possible that MRP touches open ASN? 

Below is example. Scheduled quantity is 560, partially goods received is 280 and open quantity is 280.

MRP changes scheduled quantity to 280, but it should create new line with scheduled quantity 280. 

 Here is the result after MRP. 280EAs is missing.


Thanks for any kind of advice.

entry.title: I have 1 client using ECC6 EHP6; he is forced to implement pacs.008 which is replacing MT103;
entry.content:
Hello,

I have 1 client using ECC6 EHP6; he is forced to implement pacs.008 which is replacing MT103 according to the law;Will this be a Z t-code it it can be a standard transaction and how shall we proceed? Thanks in advance for your answer.

Regards

G.Tatayah

entry.title: AL11 pathway source
entry.content:
Apart from debugging, from a posted invoice,is there another way from tables how can we figure out the AL11 pathway for the path of the invoices processed?

Thank you in advance for your comments,

Regards

G.Tatayah

entry.title: Issue with Automatic Cancellation of Purchase Invoice in Intercompany Billing
entry.content:
After canceling a sales invoice using transaction code VF11, the corresponding purchase invoice on the receiving side is not automatically canceled. As a result, the accounting document on the receiving side remains active, and manual cancellation is required.

Is it standard SAP functionality that the purchase invoice is not automatically canceled when a sales invoice is canceled via VF11? If this is not the standard behavior, could you please advise on how to configure the system to automatically reverse the related purchase invoice when the sales invoice is canceled?

entry.title: FMLA implementation in France
entry.content:
Is there any customer who have implemented 

Family and Medical Leave

in france or any other european country ?

These is to know if it's worth investigate the potential of these feature coming into SuccessFactors in H2 2025

entry.title: MIGO MIRO slowness
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

I have a problem with the MIGO and MIRO transactions, each entry (entry) that is made with certain types of materials in the transactions lasts 1 hour to 3 hours on average.

Do you have any suggestions to improve the time?

EHP6 FOR SAP ERP 6.0

SYBASE 15.7.0.101

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Extending Process Purchase Requisition(F1048A) app for Business need
entry.content:
Application Component : MM-FIO-PUR-REQ-SOC

 

Our Business requirement is to enable “Create Purchase order” button all the time for all PR’s in the list irrespective of the PR Type(Blocked, restrict). 

 

We have tried enabling the Create Purchase Order button by going for Adaptation project but this option is disabled.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error when setting the deletion flag
entry.content:
Hello

We want to use report PPARCHP1 to set a deletion flag on a production order. The job terminates with the error message

Entry 000093799376 0001 000000000000 already exists
Message no. 26275

 

The same error occurs if you want to set this manually directly in the order.

entry.title: How can I made a mass upload for materials in the transaction CJ20N?
entry.content:
Dear All:

I would Like to know how to upload a mass list of material created in excel_file, to the transaction #CJ20N.
Any recomendation or guidences would be very appreciate.
BR

Rocio

#

entry.title: How to configure & view the ESOP amount to display in Form 16 & in which section ? Need urgent help
entry.content: Hi. I have a wagetype configured for maintaining ESOP amount in Infotype 15 . It is reflecting in Annual Perk but not in Form 16 of the employee ? How to do this ?

entry.title: Understanding SAP Wage Type Mapping
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm seeking information on SAP wage types. Can you guide me on where to find a table, view, report, or configuration that shows how these wage types are mapped to categories such as Total Deductions, Gross Pay, and Basic Pay?

I'm a consultant, not an SAP user, and I'm looking to understand how employee pay elements (wage types) are classified and how salaries are calculated in SAP.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: startup.bat is not recognized as an internal or external command operable program or batch file
entry.content: startup.bat" is not recognized as an internal or external command operable program or batch file while doing sum tool.

entry.title: Mass - Sales Scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Hello All, 

we have more than 200 sales scheduling agreements required to change delivery schedule number for all scheduling agreements. 

Please advise how to change delivery schedule number for all more than 200 scheduling agreements at a time? in MASS transaction, there is no object for sales scheduling agreement.

Thanks & Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: How is the value for the BMENG (confirmed quantity) field from E1STKOM picked up in the BOMMAT IDoc?
entry.content: How is the value for the BMENG (confirmed quantity) field from E1STKOM segment is pickup in the BOMMAT IDoc ? from where it is picking value as STKO has BMENG field which is Base quantity field.And in IDoc segment E1STKOM it is with name Confirmed quantity

entry.title: MD67 Split number of weeks
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I have an issue with automatic split of PIRs. i have maintained settings below and expect that after MD67 run I'll have first 7 months split into weekly requirements and first 8 weeks split into daily requirement.

 

But after MD67 run (on December 2nd 2024) this is what i get. Look like 8 weeks were split as expected, but then monthly split stopped in April way earlier than it should.

Am i misunderstanding how MD67 works?

entry.title: Enable of Park Post facility in SAP
entry.content:
We are enabling RPA in manual JV because in SAP in Tcode ZFB03 there is no facility of Park and post.
The benefit of RPA is that because of RPA there will be Park Post facility and for multiple line items approval a single approval will be send to approver and approver will approve it and get automatic posted in SAP. 
 
I am convincing my team to not to adopt RPA and instead of it enable the system of Park and Post in SAP only.
 
Kindly reply me is it possible to enable park post facility in ZFB03 as it will save our cost of RPA implementation.

entry.title: Can't remove free article in tick box
entry.content:
In ME21N or ME22N, i want to untick free article since article has a Purchase price on inforecord level,

But ticking comes back as i save purchase order,

How can I solve this?

txs,

sophie

entry.title: Remediation step on weak TLS vulnerability
entry.content:
I need on how to remediate system vulnerability reported by our VA tool. It is related to TLS. The step suggested by the tool is very general and not specific for SAP ECC on Suse Linux environment. Please find the attached file for detailed vulnerability.

 

Regards,

 

Zaharah
